name: Shanghai Diesel Engine Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Diesel Engine Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells diesel engines in China. The company provides natural gas engines, diesel engines for gensets, engines for construction machinery, truck engines, marine engines, and bus and coach diesel engines. Its products are primarily used in heavy-duty vehicles, passenger cars, engineering machinery, ships, and mobile power stations. The company was founded in 1947 and is based in Shanghai, China.
